HomePage.title: Manual nutrition tracking in English and Hebrew.
HomePage.description: Create an account, manage a profile and manual targets, and add, edit, or delete daily diary entries in a direction-aware interface.

status.title: Current scope
status.body: Accounts, profile and manual targets, manual diary tracking, food search and selection, and custom-food creation and editing are implemented. Custom-food management, barcode scanning, recipes, external ingestion, broader analytics, and production deployment remain unavailable.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Sign in with email and password to manage your manual targets and diary entries.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.description: Create an account with email and password for manual target and diary tracking.

status.ready: This form uses Supabase Auth. Profile, manual targets, and diary tracking are available after sign-in.
status.checkEmail: The account was created, but this app cannot complete email confirmation yet.

errors.authFailed: We could not complete that auth request. Check the details and try again.
errors.missingConfig: Supabase environment values are missing on this machine.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

Setup.label: Profile & targets
Setup.titleInitial: Complete your profile and manual targets.
Setup.subtitleInitial: Add the basics for this account. Targets are optional and can stay blank until you are ready to enter them manually.
Setup.subtitleEdit: Review your profile details and update any manual targets you want to manage yourself.

profile.displayNameHelp: This name is only for the app interface. Unit system remains metric in the current MVP.

targets.title: Manual daily targets
targets.description: Enter targets you chose yourself. Changes saved here apply from {date}, the current calendar date on this device. This app does not calculate calorie or nutrition targets.
targets.blankHelper: Blank means not set. Zero means an intentional value of 0.

status.idle: Save when the profile details are ready. Manual targets can be left blank.

retrievalError.title: Setup could not be loaded
retrievalError.body: We could not load your profile and target data. Nothing can be edited until the current values load successfully.

errors.generic: We could not save setup right now. Try again in a moment.
errors.unauthenticated: Sign in again before saving setup.
errors.validation: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.displayNameTooLong: Display name must be 80 characters or fewer.
errors.invalidNumber: Enter a valid number or leave the field blank.
errors.invalidInteger: Calories must be a whole number.

bootstrap.setupTitle: Opening targets for your local date
bootstrap.status: Determining the current calendar date on this device...

manual.description: If automatic date detection is unavailable, choose the calendar date on this device and continue.
manual.label: Calendar date

errors.title: Choose a valid calendar date
errors.invalid: That calendar date does not exist or is outside the supported years 0001 through 9999.
errors.unsupported: Use the exact YYYY-MM-DD calendar-date format without a time or surrounding spaces.
errors.repeated: Only one calendar date may be supplied. Remove repeated date parameters and try again.

recovery.description: Choose a valid calendar date to continue. No diary or target data was loaded for the invalid request.

savedMeals.title: Save a meal from this diary
savedMeals.body: Copy one meal group's current diary snapshots into a new saved meal. Your diary is not changed.

list.title: Diary entries
list.description: Diary snapshots for the selected date. Entries may be typed manually or linked to a readable selected food.
list.empty: No diary entries for this date yet.
list.saveIdle: Update the fields you want to change.
list.saveError: Could not update entry. Check the fields and try again.
list.deleteError: We could not delete this entry. Try again.

totals.title: Daily totals
totals.description: Consumed totals from the manual entries loaded for this date.

targetProgress.title: Target progress
targetProgress.body: Compare manual diary totals for {date} with the target effective on that date.
targetProgress.emptyTitle: No target is effective for this date
targetProgress.emptyBody: Target progress appears after a manual calorie, protein, carbohydrate, or fat target is effective for the selected date.

form.title: Add manual entry
form.description: Type a food manually or select a readable food to prefill an editable diary snapshot.

help.mealType: Choose where this entry belongs in the day.
help.foodName: Use any clear food name. Mixed Hebrew and English names are okay.
help.brandName: Add a brand only when it helps you recognize the item.
help.servingQuantity: Leave blank if the amount is not useful. Zero is saved as 0.
help.calories: Whole number only. Blank means not set; 0 is allowed.
help.protein: Grams. Blank means not set; 0 is allowed.
help.carbohydrates: Grams. Blank means not set; 0 is allowed.
help.fat: Grams. Blank means not set; 0 is allowed.

selection.invalid: The food selection id is invalid. No food lookup was run; you may continue with a manual entry.
selection.invalidRepeated: Only one food selection may be supplied. No food lookup was run; remove repeated foodId parameters or continue manually.
selection.unavailableBody: That food is missing, archived, or not readable by this account. No food data was used; you may continue manually.
selection.failureTitle: Selected food could not be loaded
selection.failureBody: We could not retrieve that food right now. No food data was fabricated; you may continue manually.
selection.editableSnapshot: Review every prefilled value before submitting. These are editable snapshot values and do not scale automatically when serving quantity changes.

help.name: Use a recognizable private name up to 200 characters.
help.language: Choose English, Hebrew, or mixed/language-neutral metadata.
help.foodName: Required snapshot text; it is not refreshed from a linked food.
help.brand: Optional snapshot brand. Blank is stored as not set.
help.servingQuantity: Optional finite amount. Blank is not set; zero is preserved.
help.servingUnit: Optional snapshot unit, such as g, cup, piece, or serving.
help.calories: Optional nonnegative whole number. Blank is not set; zero is preserved.
help.protein: Optional nonnegative grams. Blank is not set; zero is preserved.
help.carbohydrates: Optional nonnegative grams. Blank is not set; zero is preserved.
help.fat: Optional nonnegative grams. Blank is not set; zero is preserved.
help.notes: Optional snapshot notes for this item.

status.idle: Add a manual entry when the required fields are ready.

errors.database_error: We could not save or load diary entries right now.
errors.invalidInteger: Calories must be a whole number.
errors.invalidNumber: Enter a valid number or leave the field blank.
errors.invalidFoodSelection: Choose a valid food selection or remove it.
errors.unauthenticated: Sign in again before using the diary.
errors.validation: Check the highlighted fields and try again.

CustomFoodEditor.label: Custom foods
CustomFoodEditor.descriptionCreate: Save a private food with its identity, nutrient basis, optional nutrient values, and aliases.
CustomFoodEditor.descriptionEdit: Update the current private food values. Existing nutrients and aliases are replaced by the complete submitted form.
CustomFoodEditor.archivedNotice: This food is archived. You can edit it here, but it remains archived and unavailable in search and diary prefill.

identity.title: Identity
identity.help: Name is required. Brand is optional, and the food language describes this food rather than the interface.
identity.name: Name

basis.title: Nutrient basis
basis.help: Choose the reference amount for every nutrient value below.
basis.warning: Changing the basis does not convert existing values. Submitted values are interpreted under the newly selected basis.
basis.fixed100g: Values apply to a fixed reference of 100 g. No additional serving metadata is needed.
basis.fixed100ml: Values apply to a fixed reference of 100 ml. No additional serving metadata is needed.

nutrients.title: Nutrients
nutrients.help: Every value is optional and applies to the selected basis. Blank removes the nutrient; 0 stores an explicit zero.

aliases.title: Aliases
aliases.help: Add up to 20 raw search aliases. No translation or transliteration is generated.
aliases.count: {count, plural, one {# alias} other {# aliases}} added (maximum 20).

status.idle: Review the complete form, then save when ready.
status.validationError: Check the highlighted fields and try again.
status.databaseError: We could not save this custom food right now. Try again in a moment.
status.unauthenticated: Sign in again before saving this custom food.
status.notFound: This custom food is unavailable or is not owned by this account.

retrieval.failureTitle: Custom-food editor could not be loaded
retrieval.failureBody: We could not safely load the editor data. Nothing can be edited until the current values and nutrient dictionary load successfully.
retrieval.invalidBody: This edit link does not contain a valid food identifier. No food lookup was run.
retrieval.unavailableBody: That food does not exist, is public, or is not a private custom food owned by this account.

errors.validation: Check this field and try again.
errors.servingQuantity: Enter a positive finite serving quantity.
errors.invalidNumber: Enter a finite numeric value or leave this nutrient blank.
errors.aliasBlank: Enter alias text or remove this alias row.
errors.aliasDuplicate: This normalized alias is already used for the selected language.
errors.aliasTooMany: A custom food can have at most 20 aliases.
errors.invalidLink: The submitted food identifier does not match this editor.

CustomFoodManagement.label: Custom foods
CustomFoodManagement.title: Manage your custom foods.
CustomFoodManagement.description: Review, edit, archive, or restore private foods owned by this account. Archived foods remain editable but stay out of search and diary prefill until restored.
CustomFoodManagement.count: {count, plural, one {# food} other {# foods}} in this view.

success.archived: Custom food archived successfully. Existing diary history remains unchanged.
success.restored: Custom food restored successfully and is available for search and diary prefill again.

active.title: No active custom foods
active.body: Create a private custom food to make it available in food search and diary prefill.

archived.title: No archived custom foods
archived.body: Foods that you archive will appear here and can be restored later.

invalid.title: Invalid management link
invalid.body: The status or page parameter is invalid or repeated. No custom-food list query was run.

retrieval.title: Custom foods could not be loaded
retrieval.body: We could not safely load your custom foods right now. No database details are shown.

actions.confirmationBody: It will leave search and diary prefill, but existing diary history remains unchanged. You can restore it later.

errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Sign in again before changing this food.
errors.unavailable: This food is unavailable or cannot be changed by this account.
errors.database: We could not change this food right now. Try again in a moment.

FoodSearch.label: Food catalog
FoodSearch.title: Search readable foods.
FoodSearch.description: Find public foods and your own custom foods by name, alias, or brand, then choose one to prefill a diary snapshot.

form.label: Food name, alias, or brand
form.help: Enter at least 2 characters. Search supports English, Hebrew, and mixed text.

initial.title: Start with a food search
initial.body: Enter a food name, known alias, or brand to view readable catalog entries.

tooShort.title: Add another character
tooShort.body: Food search starts at 2 normalized characters. No database search was run.

invalid.title: Check the search query
invalid.repeated: Only one search query may be supplied. Remove repeated q parameters and try again.
invalid.tooLong: Search queries must be 100 characters or fewer.

empty.title: No readable foods found
empty.body: Try another food name, alias, or brand. Private foods owned by other users are never included.

failure.title: Food search could not be loaded
failure.body: We could not search readable foods right now. No database details were exposed.

selection.invalidDate: The supplied diary date is invalid. Search remains available, but selection will return to browser-local Today.
selection.invalidDateRepeated: Only one diary date may be supplied. Search remains available, but repeated date context is not carried into selection.

results.title: Search results ({count})
results.readOnly: Selecting this result only prefills the diary form. It does not create an entry.
results.limit: Up to 20 results are shown for each search.

ReusableFoods.label: Quick reuse
ReusableFoods.title: Favorites and recent foods.
ReusableFoods.description: Reuse readable foods from your favorites or from foods you previously logged. A food may appear in both lists.

date.invalid: The supplied diary date is invalid. Reusable foods remain available, but diary selection will return to browser-local Today.
date.repeated: Only one diary date may be supplied. Reusable foods remain available without carrying repeated date context.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.empty: No readable favorite foods yet. Add favorites from food search or recent foods.

recent.title: Recent foods
recent.empty: No linked foods have been logged yet. Manual entries without a selected food do not appear here.

card.currentValues: Food identity, source, and serving values are current catalog metadata. Using this food only prefills an editable diary snapshot.

errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Sign in again before changing favorites.
errors.unavailable: This food is unavailable or cannot be favorited by this account.
errors.database: We could not change this favorite right now. Try again in a moment.

error.title: Reusable foods could not be loaded
error.body: We could not retrieve favorites and recent foods right now. No private data was exposed.

SavedMealEditor.label: Saved meals
SavedMealEditor.descriptionCreate: Name a reusable meal and enter its ordered snapshot items.
SavedMealEditor.descriptionDiary: Review snapshots copied from the selected diary meal. Nothing changes in the diary until you separately edit it.
SavedMealEditor.descriptionEdit: Replace this meal's identity and ordered snapshot items in one atomic update.

identity.title: Meal identity
identity.help: The name and language describe this saved meal; they do not translate item snapshots.
identity.name: Meal name

items.title: Meal items
items.help: Items are saved in this order. Snapshot values stay exactly as reviewed and do not refresh from the food catalog.
items.linkRemoved: The food link will be removed when you save; the snapshot values remain.

errors.validation: Check this value and try again.
errors.duplicateRowKey: Each item identity may be submitted only once.
errors.invalidLink: This food link is not valid for the submitted item.
errors.number: Enter a valid number or leave this blank.
errors.itemCount: A saved meal must contain 1 to 50 items.
errors.nonnegative: Enter zero or a positive value.
errors.positions: Item positions must be continuous and ordered.

status.idle: Review the meal and save when ready.
status.databaseError: We could not save this meal. No partial changes were kept.
status.notFound: This saved meal is unavailable to this account.
status.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Sign in again before saving.
status.validationError: Check the highlighted fields and try again.

SavedMealEditor.archivedNotice: This meal is archived. Editing it does not restore it or make it available for diary reuse.

retrieval.failureTitle: Saved meal could not be loaded
retrieval.failureBody: We could not retrieve this saved meal right now. No data was fabricated.
retrieval.invalidBody: The saved-meal id is invalid. No saved-meal lookup was run.
retrieval.unavailableBody: This meal is missing or belongs to another account.

source.invalidBody: Provide one valid date and one supported meal type together. No diary lookup was run.
source.tooManyTitle: This diary meal is too large
source.tooManyBody: A saved meal can contain at most 50 items. Reduce the diary meal before copying it.
source.emptyBody: That meal group has no diary entries for the selected date.
source.today: Back to the selected diary date

SavedMealManagement.label: Saved meals
SavedMealManagement.title: Manage saved meals.
SavedMealManagement.description: Create, edit, archive, or restore your private reusable meal snapshots.
SavedMealManagement.count: {count, plural, one {# saved meal} other {# saved meals}}

active.title: No active saved meals
active.body: Create a blank saved meal or copy a meal group from Today.

archived.title: No archived saved meals
archived.body: Meals you archive will appear here and can be restored.

invalid.title: Invalid saved-meal filters
invalid.body: Use one active or archived status and one positive page number. No saved-meal query was run.

retrieval.title: Saved meals could not be loaded
retrieval.body: We could not retrieve your saved meals right now. No private data was exposed.

actions.confirmationBody: It will leave the active list and cannot be reused in the diary until restored. Its items and snapshots remain stored, and existing diary entries stay unchanged.

errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Sign in again before changing this meal.
errors.unavailable: This saved meal is unavailable to this account.
errors.database: We could not change this saved meal right now.

today.label: Today workspace
today.title: Track a selected day.
today.description: Review the target effective for the selected date and add, edit, or delete manual diary entries with daily totals and target progress.
today.placeholderBody: Profile settings, effective-dated targets, diary entries, totals, and progress are stored for the signed-in account.
today.setupCalloutBody: Add profile details and optional manual targets before using the complete tracking loop.
today.targetEmptyTitle: No manual target is effective for this date
today.targetEmptyBody: Your profile is ready, but no target is effective for the selected diary date. Current target management uses this device's current calendar date.

profileRetrievalError.title: Profile status could not be loaded
profileRetrievalError.body: We could not load your profile right now. Diary content remains available, but the setup prompt is hidden until this read succeeds.

targetRetrievalError.title: Targets could not be loaded
targetRetrievalError.body: We could not load the target for this date. Diary content remains available, but target summary and progress are hidden until this read succeeds.

targetSummary.title: Manual daily targets
targetSummary.body: These values are effective on {date}. They are not calculated recommendations.
